title: Inline Scanning, Delimiters, Escapes, Code Spans, and Emphasis
description: A regex pairs the first and last asterisks, parses markup inside code, mishandles backslash escapes, loses literal delimiters, and becomes quadratic on long adversarial input. Learners cumulatively produce bounded inline tokenizer and delimiter resolver through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Advance one cursor through text, escapes, entities, code spans, delimiters, links, and literal fallbacks without dropping characters.
Match bounded backtick runs, normalize permitted interior whitespace, preserve code text, and reject missing closure predictably.
Classify delimiter runs from surrounding characters, track opener and closer state, and resolve nested emphasis deterministically.
